titleStmt.title: SII 8.363: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 363. (A.R. No. 84 of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇō¨rvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitā¨rṇnavaṁ . dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuva
naṁ vapuḥ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakkrava¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vija
yarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamūcaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukha
saṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna naṁtaṟpurādhya
kṣa karituragasāhaṇaṁ pe¨rggaḍe śrīkaraṇaṁ herikannaḍasandhivigrahi pasāytaṁ manave¨rggaḍe sēnādhipati haḍapavaḷaṁ
daṇḍanāyakaṁ ba¨rmmarasaru śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakrava¨rti jagadēkamalla varuṣa 5neya duṁdubhisaṁvatsara
da Akṣaya tritīyetithi nimittavāgi daṇḍanāyaka kēsirājana magaṁ mahādēvaṁge tammāḷkeya guttiya
kōṭeya staḷa vṛttiyalu kariyakeyi mattaru 20 maṁ bīḍu nivēśanamumanoṁdu baṇaṁceya nivēśanamaṁ
brāhmaṇavṛttiyāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi śrībillavarasara rājādhyakṣaṁ pāḷeyada sāvāsi hiriyānaṁdabhaṭṭanāyakarigaṁ
surabhaṭṭanāyakarigaṁ dēvabhaṭṭanāyakarigaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyaka kēsimayyaṁgaṁ
nāyakaṁgaṁ rēcarasaṁgaṁ mahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ mallidēvana nāyakaṁgaṁ rāmadēvaṁgaṁ rājādhyakṣada bā
carasaṁgaṁ sama¨rppisa liṁtini¨rbbaruvi¨rddu kāḷimayyana haṭṭiyiṁ teṁkaṇa Ereyahoḷadoḷage dōṇiya keyyiṁ teṁkalu baḍage
geyyiṁ baḍage mikkidakeyimattareppattaṁ bāceyyanagaḍiṁ mūḍalaṁgaḍi yiṁ mūḍalagaliṁkai 3 bāḷa 24 kayyamane
ya nivēśana voṁdu bhōjanakke tanamaneyiṁ paḍuvalubaṇa ja nivēśana voṁdu . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . bahubhi¨rvvasudhādattā pā¨rtti
vaissagarādibhiḥ . yasyayasya yadābhūmistasyatasya tadā paḷaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēt vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhiṁ va¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] gāmēkāṁ ratnikāmēkāṁ bhōmērapyēkamaṁgulaṁ . harannarakamāpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁplavaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 8.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
